description: Index of the machine-readable /agent/ surface of truststandardprotocol.com. TSP reports evidence integrity — never truth, correctness, legality, safety, or compliance.

files.description: Protocol summary for agents — TrustEnvelope v3, verification semantics, the claim boundary.
Demo/fixture issuer manifest for the public verify demos. Not a production or official-status key.
Placeholder descriptor for a future hosted verify endpoint. Not a live endpoint; verification is offline and client-side today.

related.description: Production issuer manifest (trust anchor) — distinct from the demo manifest above.
